rulings.Case Title: QI REN LI ET AL VS. IDAMAE LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant West Valley Structural Co. Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 1, 2018, line 1. Defendant West Valley Structural Co. Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED. Triable issues of material fact. See Reply to Plaintiff's Additional Material Facts, e.g. Facts 1, 2, and 7. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 1, 2018, line 2. PLAINTIFF DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication continued to May 16, 2018 to be heard in Department 302 per April 18, 2018 Order. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KAMLESH PATEL VS. STANLEY PROCTOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 1, 2018, line 4. DEFENDANT STANLEY PROCTOR Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/AJR)
